agent_role_selection.selection_rationale: The target slice is proof-review and reporting evidence, so R15-008 tests evidence-bounded re-entry through the R15-004 evidence_auditor role rather than implementation.

memory_scope_application.compaction_rule: After interruption or compaction, reload only the exact allowed paths and bounded evidence refs in this packet; chat memory is not proof.
